titleStmt.title: SII 19.321: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 321. (A.R. No. 690 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUNGUḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE GAṆĒŚA SHRINE, NEḌUṄGAḶANĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records an endowment of six vēli of land, including 3/4 vēli of tank-bed and house-site areas, after purchasing it tax-free from the sabha of Tirunārāyaṇa chaturvēdimaṅgalam in [Mīy]śiṅgiḷi-nāḍu by Śēndaṉ Kāri alias Vaḍapuraiyūrnāttu Mūvēndavēḷāṉ. This land is stated to have been distributed in specified extents in perpetuity as vāḍākkaḍaṉ among twelve persons who were to measure out between them, to the temple of Kayilāyattu-Mahādēva 157 kalam and odd of paddy at one kalam and odd on every mā of land every year, half of this paddy being intended for the daily requirements of midday worship and offering to the god as tiruchchennaḍai, and the other half for the maintenance of four uvachchar (musicians) doing service in the temple. The inscription may probably be one of Uttama-Chōḷa though the writing appears to be later.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉmarkku yāṇṭu patiṉmuṉṟāvatu vaṭapuṟaiyūr nāṭṭu
centaṉ kāriyāṉa cempiyaṉ vaṭapuṟaiyūrṉāṭṭu mu
ceṅkiḷināṭṭu brahmadeyam tirunārāyaṇacaturvetimaṅkalattu sa
bhaiyāriṭai nāṉ Iṟaiyiliyāka vilaikoṇṭa nilam Ivvūr ḻikka
ḻakkoṇṭa nilam Aṟuveli Ivvaṟuveli nilattukkum kiḻpāṟkellai sabhai
nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai kuṭinilattiṉ vaṭavarukey kiḻakkoṭi
ya vāykkālukkum Āṟṟukkulait talaivāyiṉ nilattukkum durgaiyār nilat
tukku vaṭakkum miypāṟkellai kuṭinilattiṉ kiḻarukey poṉa pilāṟuṭpaṭa pilāṟṟukku
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ellaipperuvaḻikkut teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunā
ṉkellaiyuḷ ḷakappaṭṭa nilam Aṟuveli Itaṉil kuḷattukkum Ūriruk
kaikkumāka nilam mukkālu nirnilaṉ Aiñcekālum Āka Innilam Aṟuveliyum
Ivvūrk kāccuvaṉ brahmanārāyaṇabhaṭṭa somayājiyārkkum mokaliyaṉ cerumaṉ nārāyaṇa
ṉukkum kavarkāci Iḷaiyavāsudevaṉ kavarkāci piramaṉ comaṉukkum kavarkāci piramaṉ
tāyaṉukkum mokaliyaṉ ceyyāṉ cerumaṉukkum kavarkāci vāsudevaṉukkum valava
māppukaḷibhaṭṭaṉ centaṉ veḷḷaikkum kavarkāci cittaṉ subrahmaṇya somayājiyār
kkum viravalla śivadāsakramavittaṉukkum mokiliyaṉ pūti nārāyaṇaṉukkum mokili
yaṉ comaṉ nārāyaṇaṉukkum Āka Ippaṉṉiruvarkkum nāṉ dhanmadāṉamāka Ivvaṟuveli velini
lam Aṭṭikkuṭuttu Iñilattil kuḷamum ñilamaṉaiyum Iṟaiyiliyāka nikki nir nilam
Añcekālum Ivvūr śrīkayilāyattu mahādevarkku Aṭṭuvatāṉa Iṟainellu māttā
ṟ kalane tūṇippatakkāka kiḷḷikuṭidevar cūlakkālāl Āṇṭuvarai vāṭākkaṭa ṉaṭṭuva tāṉa I
ñellu nūṟṟaimpatteḻukalane tūṇippatakkillum Idevarkkut tirucceṉṉa
ṭaiyākat tiruvamutu Uccampotaikku Arici nāṉāḻikku nellukkuṟuṇi Iru nāḻiyum kaṟiya
mutukkum neyamutukkum tayiramutukkum Aṭaikkāyamutukkum nellu nāṉāḻiyum śrīpalik
key viḷakkukku Eṇṇaikku nellu nāṉāḻiyum tirumeḻukku Iṭuvāṉukku nittam nellu muṉnā
ḻiyum Āka nicatam nellup patakku Aññāḻiyāka Āṇṭuvarai nellu Eḻupatteṇṅkalane Irutūṇikkuṟu
ṇiyum maṭṭakkaṭavār kāccuvaṉ brahmanārāyaṇabhaṭṭa somayājiyār nilaṉ Eṇ(ṇ)mā varaikkiḻ Araikkā
liṉāl nellu paṉṉirukalane Irutūṇi kuṟuṇi muḻākke Āḻākku mokiliyaṉ comaṉ nā
nārāyaṇaṉ nilam Oṉpatumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻeḻumāvaraiyiṉāl nellu patiṉ mukkala
ne Irutūṇi kuṟuṇi Aṟuṉāḻiyum kavarkāci Iḷaiya vāsūdevaṉ kāri nilam Oṉpatu māk kāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ Eḻumāvaraiyiṉāl nel
lup patiñkalamum kavarkāci piramaṉ comaṉ nilam Aṟumā Araikkāṇi muṉtirikaik kiḻk kāliṉāl nellu Oṉpatu kalane mukku
ṟuṇi Aññāḻi Uḻakkum kavarkāci piramaṉ tāyaṉ nilam Aṟumāviṉāl nellu mukkala ṉe tūṇippatakkum mokili
yaṉ cerumaṉ nilam Eṭṭumākkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻmukkāle Araikkāliṉāl nellu paṉ nirukalane tūṇippatakku ṉānāḻi kavar
kāci vāsudevaṉ nilam Eṭṭumākkāṇi Araikkāṇiyāl nellup patiṉkalane Irutūṇi mukkuṟuṇi Aṟuṉāḻi Uḻakkāḻākkum Iññe
llu tirukkoyil Uṭaiyārvacam kār pātiyum piyāṉam pātiyum
Aṭṭuvatākavum Iśrīkoyiṟ koṭṭum Uvaccar Āḷ nālukku nittam nellu patakkaññāḻi
Āka Āṇṭuvarai nellu Eḻupatteṇkalane Irutūṇikkuṟuṇiyum Aṭṭakkaṭavār kavar
kāci vāsūdevaneṉ nilam Araimā Araikkāṇik kiḻeḻumāvaraiyāl nellu Irutūṇi mukkuṟu
ṇi nāṉāḻi muḻākke Āḻākkum valavū naṭṭaṉ centaṉ veḷḷai nilam Eṇmā varai Araikkāṇi
muntirikaik kiḻeḻumāvaraiyiṉāl nellu patiṉmukkalane Aṟunāḻi Uri Āḻākkum kavar kācit taṉ subrahma
ṇyasomayājiyār nilam mukkāle Iraṇṭumākkāṇiyiṉāl nellu Irupattaiṅ kalane Iru tūṇippatakku Iru nāḻi
Uriyum viravalli śivadāsakramavittaṉ nilam Orupatu māviṉ kiḻeḻumāvaraiyiṉāl nellu patiṉmu
kkalane tūṇippatakku muṉṉāḻiyum mokiliyaṉ pūti nārāyaṇaṉ nilam Eṭṭumākkāṇi Araikkāṇik kiḻeḻumāvarai
yiṉāl nellu paṉnirukalane tūṇippatakku ḻiyum mokiliyaṉ somaṉṉārāyaṇaṉ nilam Eṭṭumākkā
ṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ nāl nellu paṉṉirukalane Irutūṇi Eḻunāḻiyum Āka Iñ
ñellu Eḻupatteṇkalane Irutūṇikkuṟuṇiyum Ivai Uvaccarkku kār pātiyum picāṉam pātiyum Aṭṭuvatākavum
Āka Iññelu nūṟṟu Aimpattu Eṇkalane tūṇippatakku Idevarkku Iññivantap paṭi cantrātittavaṟ Āṇṭu
varai Aṭṭuvatāka Ipparicu Iṉnilañ � lappāṭiuṭaiyāṉ ceṉtaṉ kāriyāṉa cempi yaṉ va
ṭapuṟaiyūrṉāṭṭu muveṉtaveḷāṉe m Eḻutineṉ Ittirunārāyaṇac caturvedimaṅkala
ttu madhyastaṉ brahmapriyaṉāṉa paḻana veḷāṉeḻuttu Itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai . .
Digital edition of SII 19.321 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
